# Landing Craft
A concierge landing service — human-researched, real Next.js code, deployed and working.
Built by propiter. First landing free.

## Pages
- /: Stop prompting. Start launching. (Home — full pitch, AI Graveyard comparison, pricing teaser)
- /how-it-works: From your idea to a live landing. No prompting required. (3-step concierge process)
- /why-not-ai: AI builders can't do taste. Here's why. (Evidence, anatomy of AI slop, craft principles)
- /showcase: Real landings, built with Landing Craft. (Filterable gallery of delivered projects)
- /pricing: One price for your first landing: $0. (Free / Credits / Pro tiers)
- /faq: Every question, honestly answered. (Grouped by Quality, Ownership, Process, Practical, Legal)
- /terms: Terms of Service
- /privacy: Privacy Policy

## API
- POST /api/contact: Submit your product for a free landing. Fields: name, email, productName, productUrl, whatBuilding, whatNeed, showcaseConsent.

## Key facts
- NOT an AI builder — positioned AGAINST Lovable, v0, Bolt, Durable
- Real Next.js code in YOUR GitHub repo (no lock-in)
- Market research before design (competitor teardown, keyword mining, audience profiling)
- Deployed on Vercel (your-product.vercel.app)
- Forms work. Analytics wired. SEO is real.
- Maker: propiter (github.com/propiter)
- First landing: $0. No credit card. No trial expiration.
